requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — NBSM Conformity and Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——NBSM合格评定及项目接受
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——NBSM合格評定及項目接受

summary.en: NBSM is Nepal's national standards body and administers Nepal Standards and conformity activities. For EV chargers, the practical safety evidence expected in an IEC-aligned project package is IEC 61851-1 for conductive charging system general requirements and IEC 61851-23 for DC EV supply equipment. These standards address control pilot behavior, protective earthing, insulation monitoring, electrical isolation, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, emergency stop where applicable, enclosure protection, marking, and installation instructions. Nepal's charger-specific mandatory certification route was not confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14, so exporters should treat IEC safety evidence as essential project evidence and confirm NBSM scope for the specific product and HS code.
summary.zh: NBSM是尼泊尔国家标准机构，负责尼泊尔标准和合格评定活动。对于电动汽车充电桩，IEC体系项目资料包中预期的实务安全证据是IEC 61851-1传导充电系统通用要求和IEC 61851-23直流EV供电设备要求。这些标准涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、电气隔离、互锁、过流和过温保护、适用时的急停、外壳防护、标识和安装说明。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方公开来源确认尼泊尔充电桩专属强制认证路径，因此出口商应将IEC安全证据作为必要项目证据，并按具体产品和HS编码确认NBSM适用范围。
summary.zht: NBSM是尼泊爾國家標準機構，負責尼泊爾標準和合格評定活動。對於電動汽車充電樁，IEC體系項目資料包中預期的實務安全證據是IEC 61851-1傳導充電系統通用要求和IEC 61851-23直流EV供電設備要求。這些標準涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、電氣隔離、互鎖、過流和過溫保護、適用時的急停、外殼防護、標識和安裝說明。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方公開來源確認尼泊爾充電樁專屬強制認證路徑，因此出口商應將IEC安全證據作為必要項目證據，並按具體產品和HS編碼確認NBSM適用範圍。

standards_or_laws: NBSM — Nepal Standards and conformity assessment authority
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — IP code for enclosure protection where required by project or installation conditions

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but embeds China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful for engineering review but does not by itself prove IEC 61851 conformity for an NBSM, NEA, or project-owner review in Nepal.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号和通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可用于工程审查，但其本身不能证明在尼泊尔NBSM、NEA或项目业主审查中的IEC 61851符合性。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號和通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可用於工程審查，但其本身不能證明在尼泊爾NBSM、NEA或項目業主審查中的IEC 61851符合性。

gap.en: Prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers, enclosure IP evidence suitable for the installation environment, protective-device ratings, earthing and residual-current protection details, labels and manuals in project-required languages, and Nepal site installation instructions. A standalone GB/T report should be accompanied by a clause-level gap assessment and supplementary IEC testing where differences exist.
gap.zh: 应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、认可IEC安全测试报告、直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据、适合安装环境的外壳IP证据、保护器件额定值、接地及剩余电流保护细节、项目要求语言的标签和手册，以及尼泊尔场地安装说明。单独的GB/T报告应附逐条差距评估，并在存在差异时补充IEC测试。
gap.zht: 應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、認可IEC安全測試報告、直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據、適合安裝環境的外殼IP證據、保護器件額定值、接地及剩餘電流保護細節、項目要求語言的標籤和手冊，以及尼泊爾場地安裝說明。單獨的GB/T報告應附逐條差距評估，並在存在差異時補充IEC測試。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / project-required — IEC 61851 evidence is expected for IEC-aligned NBSM, NEA, tender, and project-owner review; verify charger-specific mandatory NBSM certification scope for the product and HS code
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence for Nepal without additional review

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design baseline only. Nepal-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851-1 and, for DC chargers, IEC 61851-23 evidence, plus installation-specific enclosure, earthing, protection, marking, and manual documentation for NBSM, NEA, and project review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计基线。面向尼泊尔的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851-1证据，直流充电桩还应包括IEC 61851-23证据，并提供针对安装场地的外壳、接地、保护、标识和手册文件，供NBSM、NEA及项目审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計基線。面向尼泊爾的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851-1證據，直流充電樁還應包括IEC 61851-23證據，並提供針對安裝場地的外殼、接地、保護、標識和手冊文件，供NBSM、NEA及項目審查。
